/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/app/app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/core/window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/scene_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/scene_renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/scene_camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/scene_interaction.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/scene_serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/scene_shell.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/simple_shooter_scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/simple_shooter_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/simple_shooter_behaviour.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/simple_shooter_serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/platformer_scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/platformer_factory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/platformer_behaviour.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/scene/platformer_serializer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/resources/sprites.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/theme.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/ui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/outliner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/inspector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/controls.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/options.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/stats.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/editor_layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/simple_shooter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/platformer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/imgui/property_table.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/src/prune/tooling/imgui/layout.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/external/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/external/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/external/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/external/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/external/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdl2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Prune.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_sdlrenderer2.cpp.o -o Prune  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libSDL2_image.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libyaml-cpp.so.0.8.0
